business.name: Denver Electrical Solutions
business.tagline: Powering Denver with reliable electrical expertise

hero.headline: Emergency Electrical Repairs — *Same Day Service* in Denver
hero.subheadline: Licensed electricians available 24/7 for urgent repairs, panel upgrades, and complete rewiring. Transparent pricing, no surprises.

services_section.label: WHAT WE DO
services_section.heading: Complete Electrical Services for Denver Homes & Businesses
services_section.subheading: From emergency repairs to full electrical upgrades, we handle every job with precision and care.

services.title: Emergency Electrical Repair
services.description: Power outages, sparking outlets, and electrical emergencies resolved fast. Available 24/7 with same-day service guarantee throughout Denver metro.

services.title: Electrical Panel Upgrades
services.description: Upgrade outdated breaker panels to modern standards. Increase capacity, improve safety, and meet current electrical codes for your property.

services.title: Complete Home Rewiring
services.description: Full electrical system overhauls for older homes. Replace outdated wiring, add modern outlets, and ensure your electrical system meets today's demands.

services.title: Outlet & Switch Installation
services.description: Install new outlets, switches, and GFCI protection. Perfect for kitchen remodels, bathroom upgrades, and adding convenience throughout your home.

services.title: Commercial Electrical Work
services.description: Office lighting, equipment installation, and electrical maintenance for Denver businesses. Licensed for commercial projects of any size.

about.heading: Denver's Most Trusted Electrical Contractors Since 2015
about.body: We've been serving Denver and surrounding communities with reliable electrical services for nearly a decade. Our licensed electricians specialize in emergency repairs, panel upgrades, and complete electrical installations. Every job comes with transparent upfront pricing and a satisfaction guarantee.

reviews_section.label: REAL CUSTOMERS
reviews_section.heading: What Denver Homeowners Say About Our Work

reviews.name: Sarah M.
reviews.text: Called at 9 PM when half our house lost power. They had someone here within an hour and fixed the issue with our main panel. Professional and reasonably priced for emergency service.

reviews.name: Mike R.
reviews.text: Upgraded our 1960s electrical panel to handle our new electric car charger. They explained everything clearly and finished the job in one day. No hidden fees like other companies quoted.

reviews.name: Jennifer L.
reviews.text: Rewired our kitchen during remodel. They worked around our contractor's schedule and were incredibly neat and organized. Would definitely hire again for future electrical work.

reviews.name: David K.
reviews.text: Sparking outlet in our bathroom had us worried. They came out same day, replaced the GFCI, and checked all our other outlets for safety. Great peace of mind.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE
service_areas.heading: Electrical Services Throughout Denver Metro
service_areas.subheading: Same-day service available in these communities and surrounding areas.

cta.heading: Need Electrical Work? Get Your Free Estimate Today
cta.body: Licensed electricians ready to handle your emergency repairs, panel upgrades, or complete electrical projects. Transparent pricing with no hidden fees.
